mapper.select: SELECT application_id, user_id, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, leave_duration_type, leave_type, reason, status, created_at, updated_at, approved_at, approved_by, is_deleted FROM leave_applications WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT application_id, user_id, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, leave_duration_type, leave_type, reason, status, created_at, updated_at, approved_at, approved_by, is_deleted FROM leave_applications WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} AND is_deleted = false FOR UPDATE

SELECT application_id, user_id, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, leave_duration_type, leave_type, reason, status, created_at, updated_at, approved_at, approved_by, is_deleted FROM leave_applications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT application_id, user_id, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, leave_duration_type, leave_type, reason, status, created_at, updated_at, approved_at, approved_by, is_deleted FROM leave_applications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = #{status} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT application_id, user_id, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, leave_duration_type, leave_type, reason, status, created_at, updated_at, approved_at, approved_by, is_deleted FROM leave_applications WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO leave_applications (user_id, leave_start_date, leave_end_date, leave_duration_type, leave_type, reason, status, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{userId}, #{leaveStartDate}, #{leaveEndDate}, #{leaveDurationType}, #{leaveType,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LeaveTypeTypeHandler}, #{reason}, #{status,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LeaveStatusTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW(), COALESCE(#{isDeleted}, false))
mapper.update: UPDATE leave_applications SET user_id = #{userId}, leave_start_date = #{leaveStartDate}, leave_end_date = #{leaveEndDate}, leave_duration_type = #{leaveDurationType}, leave_type = #{leaveType,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LeaveTypeTypeHandler}, reason = #{reason}, status = #{status,typeHandler=com.attendance.app.config.typehandler.LeaveStatusTypeHandler}, is_deleted = #{isDeleted}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE leave_applications SET is_deleted = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE leave_applications SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
UPDATE leave_applications SET status = 'REJECTED', updated_at = NOW() WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN leave_duration_type IN ('AM_HALF', 'PM_HALF') THEN 0.5 ELSE (leave_end_date - leave_start_date + 1) END ), 0) FROM leave_applications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND leave_type = 'PAID_LEAVE' AND status = 'APPROVED' AND leave_start_date >= MAKE_DATE(#{year}, 1, 1) AND leave_start_date < MAKE_DATE(#{year} + 1, 1, 1) AND is_deleted = false
